templates.official_difference: The official LHMP priority is {official_priority}; it differs because the official method uses additional factors beyond StayReady's simplified Probability/Impact matrix.
templates.local_match: Official mapped evidence applies at this location: {evidence}.
templates.local_nonmatch: No mapped exposure was identified in the checked layer. This does not mean the hazard cannot affect the location.
templates.local_unavailable: Official GIS evidence was unavailable, so it was not used to change display relevance.
templates.sub_area_unavailable: Sub-area context is not currently available because reliable boundary data is unavailable.
